market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Huge homely apartment – 4 guests, premium stay
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your modern sanctuary in the heart of the city. This contemporary, homely and huge apartment comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it perfect for families or small groups seeking space and style. The entire home is yours to enjoy, featuring an open‑plan living area flooded with natural light, a fully equipped kitchen, and a stylish bedroom suite with premium bedding. Guests have praised the thoughtful design, reflected in a 4.91 rating from 11 reviews, and the attentive host Ben, a new but dedicated member of the Airbnb community. At £803 per night, the flat offers a premium experience for travelers who value comfort and location. Over the next 90 days the calendar shows a 16.3% booking rate, leaving plenty of opportunity for future guests to discover this gem. While the listing is not yet part of the Superhost program, the high review score demonstrates strong guest satisfaction. Whether you’re visiting for business or leisure, you’ll appreciate the spacious layout, contemporary décor, and the convenience of having the entire property to yourself. Book now and enjoy a memorable stay in a city‑center oasis designed for comfort and style.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or secure vehicle storage
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, wide‑angle shot of the main living area as the cover photo—it showcases the apartment’s size and contemporary design, drawing immediate interest.
key_diagnosis: Price mismatch: nightly rate is £803, which is 419% above the city median of £154, yet occupancy is only 16.3% (vs 47.8% median) – lower the price to improve bookings.
Missing high‑value amenities: no outdoor space, parking, or entertainment features listed, which are proven to boost appeal for premium travelers.
No visible photo inventory: with an unknown photo count, the listing likely lacks professional room‑by‑room images; add high‑quality photos of each space and set the living‑room as the lead image.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced £803/night – that’s 419% above the city median – yet it’s only 16.3% booked for the next 90 days.
